item.title: Unverified rumor.
item.description: Speculation that Donald Trump is at Walter Reed Medical. The roads around the hospital are reportedly closed off. The White House has called a “lid” meaning that Donald Trump will not be seen in public today.

item.title: Orwell may turn out to be the most prescient writer of all time.
item.description: Political language is designed to make lies sound truthful and murder respectable, and to give an appearance of solidity to pure wind.” – 1984

item.title: On This Day
item.description: In 1968, the Rev. Martin Luther King Jr. was assassinated in Memphis, Tennessee. King was in Memphis to support striking sanitation workers and continue his work for economic justice, voting rights and racial equality. His leadership helped transform the nation, but his life was taken before that work was complete. We remember his legacy and recommit to the work he carried forward. - SPLC
item.dc:creator: RippleOfV

item.title: 30 nice and wholesome things to brighten your day, vol 235

Evening light at Desert View, Grand Canyon National Park, Arizona.
Gold Coast, Queensland Australia
Gold Coast, Australia
Foothills of the Rocky Mountains near Estes Park, Larimer County, Colorado.
u/Dachshundloversclub
Currumbin Creek, Queensland Australia
https://www.reddit.com/r/aww/comments/1sc88l1/went_on_a_hike_and_met_this_lil_girl/
I accidentally doubled up on an image, so I removed it and added a link to this one: https://i.imgur.com/oOTC6AC.jpeg
Letter from Akira Kurosawa to Ingmar Bergman on his seventieth birthday:
Burleigh Headland national park, Queensland Australia
Mt Cougal, Queensland/New South Wales border, Australia
https://www.reddit.com/r/wholesome/comments/1scljpa/my_inheritance/

item.title: Deviousness Day 165
item.description:
had good birfday yesterday. just chill. did some gaming. so was good. still obsessing with plateup. anyway. memes. enjoy!
The above image was made by the wonderful CammyJay! They have their own channel in the deviousness discord where they share artwork and sometimes do drawings based on word prompts given by members. its a lot of fun! I has a Deviousness discord server! We do have a hard rule of no politics and/or religion. The discord is a safe space to get away from the bullshit going on. We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We have movie nights on some Saturdays! So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness If you have issues with link see dis: https://imgur.com/a/8GUNAz4 Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 was my birthday yesterday yay. know previously people have giftied me some stuffs via throne, steam, ko-fi (fees tho ugh), and cashapp from people appreciating what I do with memes here, the discord things and/or just for fun of my birthday towards things. rn id accept cashapp or! united miles. cause have been traveling a lot. so if anyone has united milage they dont use/want since i know there are business like people who have travel for the business things that their work pays for and have seen it around on imgur. if anyone wants to gift me some miles for future travel things lemme know. id take some miles. cause. miles. united just changed their earn rates so just when im starting to travel they have made it more painful for those of us that cant qualify for their cards to earn and do like. award flights or upgrades on 15 hour flights with miles things. Mind you I am in no way begging or expecting things. and also know people have gifted me things in the past so if you want to please poke me via dm here since I would like to direct that occasional generosity I have received from people towards things I could use since I dont game much anymore and not doing throne again since planning on moving at some point so trying to limit my physical stuff until that happens in the next few years. thanks! I am on dis now and trying to remember to linky over there too for when I post and also post the memes that get removed: https://bsky.app/profile/potatocheesmonk.bsky.social I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe #potato #memes #deviousness #makinmywaydowntown
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: Return of the meme: 1660 (funny crabs)
item.description:
Let's get that bread
Me, constantly.
Hell yeah
I usually reference this quote once a day.
Who wants to join my left wing rebel group?
Hell yeah.
Basically the Wallace line is the boundary between two whole ecozones. Few creatures ever crossed it.
I know this is probably AI, but goddamn this made me laugh hard. It's the sort of capitalist bullshit I'd expect someone to make if this actually happened.
WHELP
Seriously, watch the Dinosauria series by Dead Sound.
I know i posted this yesterday but again, it's one of those memes I found so hilarious and so niche that I can't resist
Aaaaaaaaaaa
Hell yeah
This is my exact philosophy
Meanings of the names of provinces of Yemen.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "beep" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin

item.title: GovBrief Today #428
item.description: An American aviator is missing tonight inside a country Donald Trump told you was finished two days ago. On Wednesday, the president addressed the nation in primetime, declared Iran "completely decimated," and called America's military "unstoppable." On Friday, Iran shot down an F-15E Strike Eagle over its territory and a second attack aircraft near the Strait of Hormuz. Two rescue helicopters took fire during the search. Iran struck four American aircraft in a single day, the first shot down by enemy fire in 23 years. Special forces rescued one crew member on Iranian soil, but the other is still out there tonight, with an Iranian governor offering a bounty and civilians searching on foot. A Wall Street Journal exclusive revealed today that last month's drone strike on the U.S. Embassy in Riyadh was far worse than anyone admitted. Two drones evaded the Patriot batteries and destroyed three floors of the embassy, including the CIA station. Officials now say it would have been a mass casualty event during working hours. They hid it for a month, the same month the president spent telling you the war was essentially over. Call your representatives through Resistbot and 5 Calls and demand congressional hearings on what this administration is hiding about the real cost of this war. We've emailed 6,800+ stories over 428 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Today on the Website: https://go.govbrief.today/260403-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-apr03 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/riyadh-embassy [3] https://go.govbrief.today/montana-tribes [4] https://go.govbrief.today/turningpt-ballots [5] https://go.govbrief.today/jobs-march26 [6] https://go.govbrief.today/military-44 [7] https://go.govbrief.today/fbi-breach [8] https://go.govbrief.today/alito-hospital [9] https://go.govbrief.today/alcatraz-budget [10] https://go.govbrief.today/georgia-property [11] https://go.govbrief.today/eo-sports [12] https://go.govbrief.today/dc-beautification [13] https://go.govbrief.today/wh-budget [14] https://go.govbrief.today/cbp-codes-leak [15] https://go.govbrief.today/wh-app-problem [16] https://go.govbrief.today/uthmeier-religion [17] https://go.govbrief.today/pentagon-protestant [18] https://go.govbrief.today/moulton-polymarket [19] https://go.govbrief.today/nevada-ice Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com A couple of internet problems overnight delayed this. Thanks for your concern!
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
